features.title: User registration and login
steps: Navigate to /register
Fill email, name, and password (8+ chars with upper/lower/digit)
Submit form → verify user created in DB, redirected to dashboard
Duplicate email submission → verify 409 CONFLICT response
Logout from dashboard
Login with same credentials → verify JWT tokens set in httpOnly cookies
Wait for access token expiry → verify auto-refresh works
Login with wrong password → verify 401 with clear error

features.title: Create and manage workspace
steps: Login and navigate to dashboard
Click 'New Workspace' → enter name and description
Submit → verify workspace appears in sidebar
Verify creator is OWNER of workspace
Invite a member by email → verify member appears in member list
Member tries to invite another → verify 403 FORBIDDEN
Owner changes member role to Admin → verify role updated
Owner removes member → verify member removed from list
Delete workspace with confirmation → verify cascade deletion

features.title: Create board with default columns
steps: Open a workspace
Click 'New Board' → enter board title
Submit → verify board created with Todo, In Progress, Review, Done columns
Add custom column → verify appears at end of column list
Rename a column → verify title updated
Delete a column → verify its tasks migrate to left adjacent column
Drag column to reorder → verify position updated after refresh
Edit board title → verify updated
Delete board with confirmation → verify cascade deletion

features.title: Create and manage tasks
steps: Open a board
Click 'Add Task' on a column → fill title, description, priority, due date
Submit → verify task card appears at column bottom
Verify priority color on card (URGENT=red, HIGH=orange, MEDIUM=default, LOW=gray)
Assign a member → verify avatar shown on card
Open task detail side panel → edit title and priority
Add sub-tasks → verify progress shown on card (e.g. 2/5)
Add labels to task → verify labels shown on card
Set due date to tomorrow → verify TASK_DUE_SOON notification received
Delete task with confirmation → verify removed from column

features.title: Drag task between columns
steps: Open a board with tasks in multiple columns
Drag a task from Todo to In Progress → verify task moved
Verify assignees receive TASK_MOVED notification
Refresh page → verify task still in In Progress column
Drag task within same column to reorder → verify position changed
Simulate network failure during drag → verify UI rolls back to original position

features.title: Task comments with @mention
steps: Open a task detail panel
Type @ in comment input → verify workspace member dropdown appears
Select a member → verify @Name inserted into text
Submit comment → verify comment appears at bottom of list
Verify @mentioned user receives COMMENT_MENTION notification
Verify comment shows author avatar, name, content, timestamp
Try to delete another user's comment → verify 403 FORBIDDEN

features.title: Notification list and mark as read
steps: Trigger notifications: assign task, move task, @mention in comment
Click notification bell → verify dropdown shows recent notifications
Verify unread count badge matches number of new notifications
Click a notification → verify marked as read and navigated to task
Verify badge count decremented
Click 'Mark all as read' → verify badge disappears
Navigate to /notifications → verify paginated list displays
Verify notification content includes task title and trigger user

features.title: Data dashboard with task statistics
steps: Open workspace dashboard page
Verify task status counts match actual board state
Verify member workload table shows assigned + completed per member
Verify burndown chart renders with ideal + actual lines
Switch time range (7d → 14d → 30d) → verify chart updates
Verify priority distribution chart renders
Navigate to workspace with no tasks → verify empty state displayed
